title: CHILDREN'S MUSEUM - 211info
text: THE CHILDREN'S MUSEUM OF SOUTHERN OREGON CHILDREN'S MUSEUM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers learning experiences that include art exhibits, fine motor skills, gross motor skills, literacy, culinary skills, music, and summer camps. Guests can purchase daily general admission or become members. 413 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm, Sunday 12pm-5pm Email (541) 772-9922 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 772-9922 Main phone Main phone (541) 772-9922 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, visit website for scholarships requirements FEES: -Daily rates: Adults $10, and ages 1-17 $15 -Members and ages 0-1: None -6 month family scholarship: $35 DOCUMENTS: Proof of public assistance programs are required for scholarships LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in downtown Medford in the historic Carnegie Building. Services: Camps Museums Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
